---
title: "Efficiency+ General Meeting"
subtitle: "June 10, 2026"
author: "ASA BIOP SWG"
format:
 revealjs:
  table-of-contents: true
  toc-depth: 1
  toc-title: Agenda
  revealjs-theme: simple
  incremental: false
  scrollable: true
  embed-resources: true
  footer: "Efficiency+"
  css: styles.css
slide-number: true
---

<style>
.reveal .footer {
  color: red !important;
}
</style>

## Agenda

1. Welcome New Members
2. Conferences (RISW, IBC, JSM, SCOPE-EU)
3. Efficiency+ Lunch at JSM
4. Guohui Wu (Regeneron) Proposal
5. ASA BIOP Webinar
6. Subteam Work Towards a Special Issue

## Welcome New Member — Yi Hong

**Yi Hong** — [Yi.hong1@gilead.com](mailto:Yi.hong1@gilead.com)

Associated Director, Clinical Data Science — Gilead Sciences

- Focuses on Advanced Analytics and AI to improve clinical trial operational efficiency and design
- Learned about Efficiency+ Trials from Dr. Anisimov's post
- Interested in learning from peers, exchanging best practices, and contributing insights from data science, AI, and clinical development

## Welcome New Member — Rakhi Kilaru

**Rakhi Kilaru** — [Rakhi.Kilaru@thermofisher.com](mailto:Rakhi.Kilaru@thermofisher.com)

Thermo Fisher Scientific

- Interested in dynamic trial monitoring
- Co-lead for CSM/QTL Special Interest Group jointly endorsed by ASA-BIOP/EFSPI and PSI (with Susan Talbot, Amgen)

## Conferences — RISW

**Invited Session:** Efficiency+: Advanced Statistical Innovations Driving Clinical Trial Efficiency

- 📅 September 2026

| Participant | Affiliation |
|---------|-------------|
| CG Wang & Guohui Wu | Regeneron |
| Jose Pinheiro | — |
| Jimeng Sun | Keiji AI |
| Dooti Roy | Boehringer Ingelheim |

## Conferences — IBC

**Contributed Session OP.02:** Clinical Trial Operations and Safety Signal Detection

- 📅 July 13, 2026, 10:45 AM – 12:15 PM | Room 401 D

| Speaker | Affiliation |
|---------|-------------|
| Fei Chen | JnJ |
| Kyle Wathen | Cytel |
| Cunyi Wang | JnJ |
| Vlad Anisimov | Amgen |

## Conferences — JSM

**Invited Paper Session #1232:** Efficiency+: Advancing Clinical Trial Operations through Innovative Statistical Methodologies — [Session link](https://ww3.aievolution.com/JSMAnnual2026/index.cfm?do=ev.viewEv&ev=5664)

- 📅 Tuesday, Aug 4, 2:00 PM – 3:50 PM | Thomas M. Menino Convention & Exhibition Center, Room CC-204B

| Speaker | Affiliation |
|---------|-------------|
| Guohui Wu | Regeneron |
| Jessica Canon-Hill | JnJ |
| Kaifeng Lu | Beonemed |
| Clara Cali Mella | Bayer *(looking for replacement)* |

## Conferences — SCOPE-EU

**Panel Discussion:** Efficiency+ SWG: Improve Clinical Trial Operations through Advanced Statistics

Data Strategy and AI Innovation Stream

- 📅 October 13–14, 2026 | Barcelona
- Moderator: Clara Cali Mella

| Panelist | Affiliation |
|---------|-------------|
| Mario Wolfs | BMS |
| Bhargava Reddy | JnJ |
| Clara Cali Mella | Bayer |
| Ken Getz | Tufts Center for Clinical Trials |

## Efficiency+ Lunch at JSM

**Title:** Efficiency+: Advancing Clinical Trial Operations through Innovative Statistical Methodologies

| | |
|---|---|
| **Date** | August 4, 2026 |
| **Time** | 12:00 PM – 1:00 PM |
| **Location** | Westin Boston Seaport District |
| **Room** | W-Hale (Conference for 10) |

*W = The Westin Boston Seaport District, 425 Summer St., Boston, MA*

Contact: Christina Link, ASA Meetings Planner — [Christina@amstat.org](mailto:Christina@amstat.org)

## Guohui Wu (Regeneron) Proposal

- Conferences in 2027 and submission deadlines
- Efficiency+ conference?

## ASA BIOP Webinar

Distance Learning Chair: Ji Young Kim

Proposed: A Distance Learning webinar to showcase past SWG achievements and preview future topics to encourage participation.

**Proposed Topics:**

1. Clinical supply chain
2. Enrollment modeling
3. Platform trials
4. Preclinical
5. Feasibility

## Subteam Work Towards a Special Issue

Potential journals:

1. Therapeutic Innovation and Regulatory Science
2. Clinical Trials
3. Statistics in Biopharmaceutical Research (ASA journal)
4. Cross-functional journals? Clinical Trials? Clinical Research News? Applied Clinical Trials?
